records.title: 14. Pakiṇṇakanipāto
records.claim: by the nāga's supernatural power tents and bedding poured forth for the merchants
records.evidence_pali: …gasūpādayo. Vāṇijā ekāti ekekassa vāṇijassa yattakā vāṇijā, tesu ekekassa ekekāva, satthavāhassa pana santike pañcavīsatīti attho. Parivāriṃsūti parivāresuṃ. Tāhi pana saddhiṃyeva nāgānubhāvena sāṇivitānasayanādīni pagghariṃsu.

records.title: 14. Pakiṇṇakanipāto
records.claim: The nāga-king recalls granting drink, divine food, attendants, and cartloads of jewels to men.
records.evidence_pali: Atha ne chindanatthāya rukkhaṃ upagate disvā nāgarājā cintesi ‘‘ahaṃ etesaṃ pipāsitānaṃ pānīyaṃ dāpesiṃ, tato dibbabhojanaṃ, tato sayanādīni ceva paricārikā ca nāriyo, tato pañcasatasakaṭapūraṃ ratanaṃ, idāni panime ‘‘rukkhaṃ mūlato…

records.title: 14. Pakiṇṇakanipāto
records.claim: nāgas came forth armed - 25 nāgas, 300 archers etc.; nāgas as an armed host
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Tato nāgā nikkhamiṃsu, sannaddhā paṇṇavīsati; Dhanuggahānaṃ tisatā, chasahassā ca vammino’’ti.

records.title: 14. Pakiṇṇakanipāto
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Ete hanatha bandhatha, mā vo muñcittha jīvitaṃ; Ṭhapetvā satthavāhaṃva, sabbe bhasmaṃ karotha ne’’ti. – ayaṃ nāgarājena vuttagāthā;

records.title: 14. Pakiṇṇakanipāto
records.claim: the nāgas returned to their own nāga-realm (nāgabhavana)
records.evidence_pali: Nāgā tathā katvā attharaṇādīni pañcasu sakaṭasatesu āropetvā satthavāhaṃ gahetvā sayaṃ tāni sakaṭāni pājentā bārāṇasiṃ gantvā sabbaṃ dhanaṃ tassa gehe paṭisāmetvā taṃ āpucchitvā attano nāgabhavanameva gatā. Tamatthaṃ viditvā satthā ovādavasena gāthādvayamāha –

records.title: 14. Pakiṇṇakanipāto
records.claim: In the jātaka identification the nāga-king was Sāriputta (the caravan-leader the bodhisatta).
records.evidence_pali: …lobhavasikā vāṇijā mahāvināsaṃ pattā, tasmā lobhavasikena na bhavitabba’’nti vatvā saccāni pakāsetvā jātakaṃ samodhānesi, saccapariyosāne te vāṇijā sotāpattiphale patiṭṭhitā. Tadā nāgarājā sāriputto ahosi, satthavāho pana ahameva ahosinti.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: wise men of old gave up nāga-glory (nāgasampatti) to keep the uposatha
records.evidence_pali: Kā nu vijjurivābhāsīti idaṃ satthā jetavane viharanto uposathakammaṃ ārabbha kathesi. Tadā hi satthā ‘‘sādhu vo kataṃ upāsakā uposathavāsaṃ vasantehi, porāṇakapaṇḍitā nāgasampattiṃ pahāya uposathavāsaṃ vasiṃsuyevā’’ti vatvā tehi yācito atītaṃ āhari.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: Campeyya nāga-king ruled a nāga-realm in the river Campā; nāga-world under the water
records.evidence_pali: Atīte aṅgaraṭṭhe aṅge ca magadharaṭṭhe magadhe ca rajjaṃ kārente aṅgamagadharaṭṭhānaṃ antare campā nāma nadī, tattha nāgabhavanaṃ ahosi. Campeyyo nāma nāgarājā rajjaṃ kāresi. Kadāci magadharājā aṅgaraṭṭhaṃ gaṇhāti, kadāci aṅgarājā magadharaṭṭhaṃ. Athekadivasaṃ magadharājā aṅgena saddhiṃ yujjhitvā yuddhaparājito assaṃ āruyha palāyanto aṅgarañño yodhehi anubaddho puṇṇaṃ campānadiṃ patvā ‘‘parahatthe maraṇato nadiṃ pavisitvā mataṃ seyyo’’ti asseneva saddhiṃ nadiṃ otari. Tadā campeyyo nāgarājā antod

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: The bodhisatta, coveting a nāga-king's splendour, was reborn in his palace as a nāga and lamented falling into the animal womb.
records.evidence_pali: Tadā bodhisatto daliddakule nibbatto rājaparisāya saddhiṃ nadītīraṃ gantvā taṃ nāgarājassa sampattiṃ disvā lobhaṃ uppādetvā taṃ patthayamāno dānaṃ datvā sīlaṃ rakkhitvā campeyyanāgarājassa kālakiriyato sattame divase cavitvā tassa vasanapāsāde sirigabbhe sirisayanapiṭṭhe nibbatti. Sarīraṃ sumanadāmavaṇṇaṃ mahantaṃ ahosi. So taṃ disvā vippaṭisārī hutvā ‘‘mayā katakusalanissandena chasu kāmasaggesu issariyaṃ koṭṭhe paṭisāmitaṃ dhaññaṃ viya ahosi. Svāhaṃ imissā tiracchānayoniyā paṭisandhiṃ gaṇhiṃ,

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: the nāga-king, weary of the animal birth, kept uposatha to escape to the human realm and win the path
records.evidence_pali: So tattha nāgarajjaṃ kārento aparabhāge vippaṭisārī hutvā ‘‘kiṃ me imāya tiracchānayoniyā, uposathavāsaṃ vasitvā ito muccitvā manussapathaṃ gantvā saccāni paṭivijjhitvā dukkhassantaṃ karissāmī’’ti cintetvā tato paṭṭhāya tasmiṃyeva pāsāde uposathakammaṃ karoti. Alaṅkatanāgamāṇavikā tassa santikaṃ gacchanti, yebhuyyenassa sīlaṃ bhijjati. So tato paṭṭhāya pāsādā nikkhamitvā uyyānaṃ gacchati. Tā tatrāpi gacchanti, uposatho bhijjateva. So cintesi ‘‘mayā ito nāgabhavanā nikkhamitvā manussalokaṃ gantvā

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: The nāga keeps cātuddasī uposatha, leaving the nāga realm to lie on an anthill.
records.evidence_pali: …ace supaṇṇo gahessati, udakaṃ pakkuthissati, sace ahituṇḍiko gaṇhissati, udakaṃ lohitavaṇṇaṃ bhavissatī’’ti āha. Evaṃ tassā tīṇi nimittāni ācikkhitvā cātuddasīuposathaṃ adhiṭṭhāya nāgabhavanā nikkhamitvā tattha gantvā vammikamatthake nipajji sarīrasobhāya vammikaṃ sobhayamāno. Sarīrañhissa rajatadāmaṃ viya setaṃ ahosi matthako rattakambalageṇḍuko viya. Imasmiṃ pana jāt…

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: The nāga endures torture without breaking, for fear of breaking his sīla during the vow.
records.evidence_pali: …eḷaṃ opitvā osadhamantaṃ katvā dante bhindi, mukhaṃ lohitassa pūri. Mahāsatto attano sīlabhedabhayena evarūpaṃ dukkhaṃ adhivāsento akkhīni ummīletvā olokanamattampi nākari. Sopi ‘‘nāgarājānaṃ dubbalaṃ karissāmī’’ti naṅguṭṭhato paṭṭhāyassa aṭṭhīni cuṇṇayamāno viya sakalasarīraṃ madditvā paṭṭakaveṭhanaṃ nāma veṭhesi, tantamajjitaṃ nāma majji, naṅguṭṭhaṃ gahetvā dussapoth…

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: the nāga-king refuses to eat frogs/parched-corn lest he kill, even at risk of death in the box
records.evidence_pali: …e ṭhapetvā sukhayānake nisinno mahantena parivārena mahāsattaṃ gāmanigamādīsu kīḷāpento ‘‘bārāṇasiyaṃ uggasenarañño santike kīḷāpetvā vissajjessāmī’’ti agamāsi. So maṇḍūke māretvā nāgarañño deti. Nāgarājā ‘‘punappunaṃ esa maṃ nissāya māressatī’’ti na khādati. Athassa madhulāje adāsi. Mahāsatto ‘‘sacāhaṃ bhojanaṃ gaṇhissāmi, antopeḷāya eva maraṇaṃ bhavissatī’’ti tepi na khādati. Brā…

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.evidence_pali: …me piyasāmiko, idānissa idha anāgacchantassa māso sampuṇṇo, kiṃ nu kho kāraṇa’’nti gantvā pokkharaṇiṃ olokentī lohitavaṇṇaṃ udakaṃ disvā ‘‘ahituṇḍikena gahito bhavissatī’’ti ñatvā nāgabhavanā nikkhamitvā vammikasantikaṃ gantvā mahāsattassa gahitaṭṭhānañca kilamitaṭṭhānañca disvā roditvā kanditvā paccantagāmaṃ gantvā pucchitvā taṃ pavattiṃ sutvā bārāṇasiṃ gantvā rājaṅga…

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: She declares 'I am not a goddess, gandhabbī, or human — I am a nāga-maiden.'
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Namhi devī na gandhabbī, na mahārāja mānusī; Nāgakaññāsmi bhaddante, atthenamhi idhāgatā.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: folk call it uraga and nāga (serpent); the snake-charmer captured it
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Yamuggatejo uragoti cāhu, nāgoti naṃ āhu janā janinda; Tamaggahī puriso jīvikattho, taṃ bandhanā muñca patī mameso.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: a nāga-maiden is asked how the powerful nāga fell into a beggar's hand; nāga-strength + nāgakaññā
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Kathaṃ nvayaṃ balaviriyūpapanno, hatthattamāgacchi vanibbakassa; Akkhāhi me nāgakaññe tamatthaṃ, kathaṃ vijānemu gahītanāgaṃ.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: the nāga could reduce a city to ashes yet honours Dhamma and practises austerity
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Nagarampi nāgo bhasmaṃ kareyya, tathā hi so balaviriyūpapanno; Dhammañca nāgo apacāyamāno, tasmā parakkamma tapo karotī’’ti.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: Gloss: the nāga-king kept the five precepts and the uposatha-dwelling as weighty.
records.evidence_pali: …hīti ahaṃ ekaṃ kāraṇaṃ paṭicca idhāgatā. Kupitindriyāti kilantindriyā. Vārigaṇāti assubindughaṭā. Uragoti cāhūti uragoti cāyaṃ mahājano kathesi. Tamaggahī purisoti ayaṃ puriso taṃ nāgarājānaṃ jīvikatthāya aggahesi. Vanibbakassāti imassa vanibbakassa kathaṃ nu esa mahānubhāvo samāno hatthattaṃ āgatoti pucchati. Dhammañcāti pañcasīladhammaṃ uposathavāsadhammañca garuṃ ka…

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: Verse: the nāga-king observes the fourteenth and fifteenth (uposatha) days at the crossroads.
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Cātuddasiṃ pañcadasiñca rāja, catuppathe sammati nāgarājā; Tamaggahī puriso jīvikattho, taṃ bandhanā muñca patī mameso’’ti.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: Gloss: the virtuous dhamma-faring nāga-king lies keeping the fourfold-resolve uposatha vow.
records.evidence_pali: …catukkamaggassa āsannaṭṭhāne ekasmiṃ vammike caturaṅgasamannāgataṃ adhiṭṭhānaṃ adhiṭṭhahitvā uposathavāsaṃ vasanto nipajjatīti attho. Taṃ bandhanāti taṃ evaṃ dhammikaṃ guṇavantaṃ nāgarājānaṃ etassa dhanaṃ datvā peḷabandhanā pamuñca.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: gloss: not a poor nāga - he has 16000 women and lives in a water-chamber (vārigeha)
records.evidence_pali: Tattha soḷasitthisahassānīti mā tvaṃ esa yo vā so vā daliddanāgoti maññittha. Etassa hi ettakā sabbālaṅkārapaṭimaṇḍitā itthiyova, sesā sampatti aparimāṇāti dasseti. Vārigehasayāti udakacchadanaṃ udakagabbhaṃ katvā tattha sayanasīlā. Ossaṭṭhakāyot…

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: The nāga-king leaves the box, sheds that form, and takes the form of an adorned brahmin youth.
records.evidence_pali: Evañca pana vatvā mahāsattaṃ peḷato nīhari. Nāgarājā nikkhamitvā pupphantaraṃ pavisitvā taṃ attabhāvaṃ vijahitvā māṇavakavaṇṇena alaṅkatasarīro hutvā pathaviṃ bhindanto viya nikkhanto aṭṭhāsi. Sumanā ākāsato otaritvā tassa santike ṭhitā. Nāgarājā añjaliṃ paggayha rājānaṃ namassamāno aṭṭhāsi. Tamatthaṃ pakāsento satthā dve gāthā abhāsi –

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Mutto campeyyako nāgo, rājānaṃ etadabravi; Namo te kāsirājatthu, namo te kāsivaḍḍhana; Añjaliṃ te paggaṇhāmi, passeyyaṃ me nivesanaṃ.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: 'a man should not trust a non-human (amānusa)'; the nāga is classed as amānusa
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Addhā hi dubbissasametamāhu, yaṃ mānuso vissase amānusamhi; Sace ca maṃ yācasi etamatthaṃ, dakkhemu te nāga nivesanānī’’ti.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: Gloss: the nāga's dwelling is the lovely Campeyya nāga realm he invites the king to see.
records.evidence_pali: Tattha passeyyaṃ me nivesananti mama nivesanaṃ campeyyanāgabhavanaṃ ramaṇīyaṃ passitabbayuttakaṃ. Taṃ te ahaṃ dassetukāmo, taṃ sabalavāhano tvaṃ āgantvā passa, narindāti vadati. Dubbissasanti duvissāsanīyaṃ. Sace cāti sace maṃ yācasi, passeyyāma t…

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: repeat: nāga as amānusa (non-human) whose abode the king will visit
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Addhā hi dubbissasametamāhu, yaṃ mānuso vissase amānusamhi; Sace ca maṃ yācasi etamatthaṃ, dakkhemu te nāga nivesanānī’’ti. –

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: may the supaṇṇas shun your whole nāga-clan; garuḍa-nāga enmity
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Saccappaṭiññā tava mesa hotu, akkodhano hohi anupanāhī; Sabbañca te nāgakulaṃ supaṇṇā, aggiṃva gimhesu vivajjayantū’’ti.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Anukampasī nāgakulaṃ janinda, mātā yathā suppiyaṃ ekaputtaṃ; Ahañca te nāgakulena saddhiṃ, kāhāmi veyyāvaṭikaṃ uḷāra’’nti.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.evidence_pali: Taṃ sutvā rājā nāgabhavanaṃ gantukāmo senaṃ gamanasajjaṃ kātuṃ āṇāpento gāthamāha –

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Yojentu ve rājarathe sucitte, kambojake assatare sudante; Nāge ca yojentu suvaṇṇakappane, dakkhemu nāgassa nivesanānī’’ti.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.evidence_pali: Tattha bahu sobhamānoti bhikkhave, bārāṇasirājā soḷasahi nārīsahassehi purakkhato parivārito tassa nārīgaṇassa majjhe bārāṇasito nāgabhavanaṃ gacchanto ativiya sobhamāno pāyāsi.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: By his own power the nāga makes his realm all jewel-built with walls and gate-towers and an adorned road.
records.evidence_pali: Tassa nagarā nikkhantakāleyeva mahāsatto attano ānubhāvena nāgabhavanaṃ sabbaratanamayaṃ pākārañca dvāraṭṭālake ca dissamānarūpe katvā nāgabhavanagāmiṃ maggaṃ alaṅkatapaṭiyattaṃ māpesi. Rājā sapariso tena maggena nāgabhavanaṃ pavisitvā ramaṇīyaṃ bhūmibhāgañca pāsāde ca addasa. Tamatthaṃ pakāsento satthā āha –

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Paviṭṭhasmiṃ kāsiraññe, campeyyassa nivesanaṃ; Dibbā tūriyā pavajjiṃsu, nāgakaññā ca naccisuṃ.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Taṃ nāgakaññā caritaṃ gaṇena, anvāruhī kāsirājā pasanno; Nisīdi sovaṇṇamayamhi pīṭhe, sāpassaye candanasāralitte’’ti.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: gloss: the adorned nāga-realm (nāgabhavana), Campeyya nāga-king's mansion thronged by nāga-maidens
records.evidence_pali: Tattha suvaṇṇacitakanti suvaṇṇavālukāya santhataṃ. Byamhanti alaṅkatanāgabhavanaṃ. Campeyyassāti nāgabhavanaṃ pavisitvā campeyyanāgarājassa nivesanaṃ pāvisi. Kaṃsavijjupabhassaranti meghamukhe sañcaraṇasuvaṇṇavijju viya obhāsamānaṃ. Nānāgandhasamīritanti nānāvidhehi dibbagandhehi anusañcaritaṃ. Caritaṃ gaṇenāti taṃ nivesanaṃ nāgakaññāgaṇena caritaṃ anusañcaritaṃ. Candanasāralitteti dibbasāracandanena anulitte.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: The king asks why a nāga with such splendour leaves it to keep uposatha on an anthill in the human world.
records.evidence_pali: …nnaṃ itthisahassānaṃ sesarājaparisāya ca. So sattāhamattaṃ sapariso dibbannapānādīni paribhuñjitvā dibbehi kāmaguṇehi abhiramitvā sukhasayane nisinno mahāsattassa yasaṃ vaṇṇetvā ‘‘nāgarāja, tvaṃ evarūpaṃ sampattiṃ pahāya manussaloke vammikamatthake nipajjitvā kasmā uposathavāsaṃ vasī’’ti pucchi. Sopissa kathesi. Tamatthaṃ pakāsento satthā āha –

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: 'no such splendour exists in the human world - why, nāga, do you do austerities?'; nāga-realm surpasses men
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘So tattha bhutvā ca atho ramitvā, campeyyakaṃ kāsirājā avoca; Vimānaseṭṭhāni imāni tuyhaṃ, ādiccavaṇṇāni pabhassarāni; Netādisaṃ atthi manussaloke, kiṃ patthayaṃ nāga tapo karosi.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: refrain: nothing like this nāga-splendour in the human world; why does the nāga practise austerity
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Tā kambukāyūradharā suvatthā, vaṭṭaṅgulī tambatalūpapannā; Paggayha pāyenti anomavaṇṇā, netādisaṃ atthi manussaloke; Kiṃ patthayaṃ nāga tapo karosi.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: refrain: rivers/fish unlike the human world; why does the nāga do austerities
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Najjo ca temā puthulomamacchā, āṭāsakuntābhirudā sutitthā; Netādisaṃ atthi manussaloke, kiṃ patthayaṃ nāga tapo karosi.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: refrain: birds unlike the human world; why does the nāga do austerities
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Koñcā mayūrā diviyā ca haṃsā, vaggussarā kokilā sampatanti; Netādisaṃ atthi manussaloke, kiṃ patthayaṃ nāga tapo karosi.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: refrain: trees/fruits unlike the human world; why does the nāga do austerities
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Ambā ca sālā tilakā ca jambuyo, uddālakā pāṭaliyo ca phullā; Netādisaṃ atthi manussaloke, kiṃ patthayaṃ nāga tapo karosi.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: refrain: divine scents from the lotus-ponds; why, nāga, do you do austerities
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Imā ca te pokkharañño samantato, dibbā ca gandhā satataṃ pavāyanti; Netādisaṃ atthi manussaloke, kiṃ patthayaṃ nāga tapo karosi.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.evidence_pali: Tattha tāti soḷasasahassanāgakaññāyo sandhāyāha. Kambukāyūradharāti suvaṇṇābharaṇadharā. Vaṭṭaṅgulīti pavāḷaṅkurasadisavaṭṭaṅgulī. Tambatalūpapannāti abhirattehi hatthapādatalehi samannāgatā. Pāyentīti dibbapānaṃ ukk…

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: Verse: 'You, mighty nāga-king possessed of all sense-pleasures — is the human world better than this?'
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Deviddhipattosi mahānubhāvo, sabbehi kāmehi samaṅgibhūto; Pucchāmi taṃ nāgarājetamatthaṃ, seyyo ito kena manussaloko’’ti.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.evidence_pali: Athassa ācikkhanto nāgarājā āha –

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Addhā have sevitabbā sapaññā, bahussutā ye bahuṭhānacintino; Nāriyo ca disvāna tuvañca nāga, kāhāmi puññāni anappakānī’’ti.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.evidence_pali: Tattha nāriyo cāti imā tava nāgakaññāyo ca tuvañca disvā bahūni puññāni karissāmīti vadati.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.evidence_pali: Atha naṃ nāgarājā āha –

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.evidence_pali: Evaṃ vutte uggaseno gantukāmo hutvā ‘‘nāgarāja, ciraṃ vasimha, gamissāmā’’ti āpucchi. Atha naṃ mahāsatto ‘‘tena hi mahārāja, yāvadicchakaṃ dhanaṃ gaṇhāhī’’ti dhanaṃ dassento āha –

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.evidence_pali: Rājā tassa kathaṃ sutvā adhivāsesi. Atha mahāsatto nāgabhavane bheriṃ carāpesi ‘‘sabbā rājaparisā yāvadicchakaṃ hiraññasuvaṇṇādikaṃ dhanaṃ gaṇhantū’’ti. Rañño ca anekehi sakaṭasatehi dhanaṃ pesesi. Rājā mahantena yasena nāgabhavanā nikkhamitvā bārāṇasimeva gato. Tato paṭṭhāya kira jambudīpatalaṃ sahiraññaṃ jātaṃ.

records.title: 15. Vīsatinipāto
records.claim: the Campeyya nāga-king gave up nāga-glory to keep the uposatha (samodhāna)
records.evidence_pali: Satthā imaṃ dhammadesanaṃ āharitvā ‘‘evaṃ porāṇakapaṇḍitā nāgasampattiṃ pahāya uposathavāsaṃ vasiṃsū’’ti vatvā jātakaṃ samodhānesi – ‘‘tadā ahituṇḍiko devadatto ahosi, sumanā rāhulamātā, uggaseno sāriputto, campeyyanāgarājā pana ahameva ahosi’’nti.

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.claim: gloss: nāgavittodā = waters endowed with the wealth/delight of nāgas; rivers associated with nāgas
records.evidence_pali: …aṃ kandarāva, atha kho bahū vanatodā tamhā tamhā vanamhā udakānipi maṃ bahūni pavisanti. Nīlavārivahindharāti maṇivaṇṇena nīlavārinā yutte udakakkhandhasaṅkhāte vahe dhārayantiyo. Nāgavittodāti nāgānaṃ vittikārena dhanasaṅkhātena vā udakena samannāgatā. Vārināti evarūpā hi bahū nadiyo maṃ vārināva abhisandanti pūrentīti dasseti.

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: Kiṃchanda kumbha jayaddisa chaddanta, atha paṇḍitasambhava sirakapi; Dakarakkhasa paṇḍaranāgavaro, atha sambula tindukadevasutoti.

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Disā catasso vidisā catasso, uddhaṃ adho dasa disā imāyo; Katamaṃ disaṃ tiṭṭhati nāgarājā, yamaddasā supine chabbisāṇa’’nti.

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Katthacchatī kattha mupeti ṭhānaṃ, vīthissa kā nhānagatassa hoti; Kathañhi so nhāyati nāgarājā, kathaṃ vijānemu gatiṃ gajassā’’ti.

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: …mupetīti kattha upeti, kattha tiṭṭhatīti attho. Vīthissa kāti tassa nhānagatassa kā vīthi hoti, kataramaggena so gacchati. Kathaṃ vijānemu gatinti tayā akathite mayaṃ kathaṃ tassa nāgarājassa gatiṃ vijānissāma, tasmā kathehi noti attho.

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Tattheva sā pokkharaṇī adūre, rammā sutitthā ca mahodikā ca; Sampupphitā bhamaragaṇānuciṇṇā, ettha hi so nhāyati nāgarājā.

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Tatthaddasā pokkharaṇiṃ adūre, rammaṃ sutitthañca mahodikañca; Sampupphitaṃ bhamaragaṇānuciṇṇaṃ, yattha hi so nhāyati nāgarājā.

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: Tattha bhayaṭṭitāti maraṇabhayena upaddutā. Aṭṭāti dukkhitā. Gajapaccamittanti gajassa paccāmittaṃ. Yena soti yattha visālamālake so nāgarājā kālaṃ katvā kelāsapabbato viya patito, taṃ ṭhānaṃ paccāgamunti attho.

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.claim: Verse: 'she was then the princess; I was then the nāga-king' — the bodhisatta identifies as the nāga.
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Yamaddasātha dahariṃ kumāriṃ, kāsāyavatthaṃ anagāriyaṃ carantiṃ; Sā kho tadā rājakaññā ahosi, ahaṃ tadā nāgarājā ahosiṃ.

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.claim: Verse: 'I was there then, monks; I was then the nāga-king' — the bodhisatta was the nāga.
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Ahaṃ vo tena kālena, ahosiṃ tattha bhikkhavo; Nāgarājā tadā homi, evaṃ dhāretha jātaka’’nti. –

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.claim: Gloss: the bodhisatta was the nāga-king pierced by the poisoned arrow; the princess was the instigator, Devadatta the hunter.
records.evidence_pali: …ā evamāha – ‘‘bhikkhave, yaṃ ekaṃ daharaṃ yobbanappattaṃ kumāriṃ kāsāyavatthaṃ anagāriyaṃ upetaṃ pabbajitvā imasmiṃ sāsane carantiṃ addasātha passatha, sā tadā ‘visapītena sallena nāgarājaṃ vijjhitvā vadhehī’’’ti sonuttarassa pesetā rājakaññā ahosi. Tena gantvā jīvitakkhayaṃ pāpito ahaṃ tadā so nāgarājā ahosinti attho. Devadattoti, bhikkhave, idāni devadatto tadā so luddako ahosi.

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.claim: Gloss: 'I was none other than the nāga-king there at Chaddanta lake.'
records.evidence_pali: …na vītasoko, rāgasallādīnaṃ vigatattā visallo attanāva jānitvā buddho abhāsīti. Ahaṃ voti ettha voti nipātamattaṃ, bhikkhave, ahaṃ tena kālena tattha chaddantadahe ahosinti attho. Nāgarājāti honto ca pana na añño koci tadā homi, atha kho nāgarājā homīti attho. Evaṃ cārethāti tumhe taṃ jātakaṃ evaṃ dhāretha uggaṇhātha pariyāpuṇāthāti.

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: [518] 8. Paṇḍaranāgarājajātakavaṇṇanā

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.claim: Paṇḍara nāga-king; garuḍa-king asks how to seize nāgas since many garuḍas die catching them
records.evidence_pali: Eko nāgarājāpissa supaṇṇarājā ca upaṭṭhānaṃ āgacchanti. Tesu nāgarājā nāmena paṇḍaro nāma. Athekadivasaṃ supaṇṇarājā tassa santikaṃ gantvā vanditvā ekamantaṃ nisinno evamāha – ‘‘bhante, amhākaṃ ñātakā nāge gaṇhantā bahū vinassanti, etesaṃ nāgānaṃ gahaṇaniyāmaṃ mayaṃ na jānāma, guyhakāraṇaṃ kira tesaṃ atthi, sakkuṇeyyātha nu kho tumhe ete piyāyamānā viya taṃ kāraṇaṃ pucchitu’’nti. So ‘‘sādhū’’ti sampaṭicchitvā supaṇṇarāje vanditvā pakkante nāgarājassa āgatakāle vanditvā nisinnaṃ nāgarājānaṃ pucch

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: Atha naṃ tatiyadivase āgantvā nisinnaṃ, ‘‘nāgarāja, ajja tatiyo divaso, mama pucchantassa kimatthaṃ na kathesī’’ti āha. ‘‘Tumhe aññassa ācikkhissathā’’ti bhayena, bhanteti. Kassaci na kathessāmi, nibbhayo kathehīti. ‘‘Tena hi, bha…

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: Atha tasmiṃ pakkante supaṇṇarājā āgantvā karampiyaacelaṃ vanditvā ‘‘kiṃ, bhante, pucchitaṃ te nāgarājassa guyhakāraṇa’’nti āha. So ‘‘āmāvuso’’ti vatvā sabbaṃ tena kathitaniyāmeneva kathesi. Taṃ sutvā supaṇṇo ‘‘nāgarājena ayuttaṃ kataṃ, ñātīnaṃ nāma nassananiyāmo parassa na kathetabbo, hotu, ajjeva mayā supaṇṇavātaṃ katvā paṭhamaṃ etameva gahetuṃ vaṭṭatī’’ti supaṇṇavātaṃ katvā paṇḍaranāgarājānaṃ naṅguṭṭhe gahetvā heṭṭhāsīsaṃ katvā gahitagocaraṃ chaḍḍāpetvā uppatitvā ākāsaṃ pakkhandi. Paṇḍaro ākās

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto

records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Vikiṇṇavācaṃ aniguyhamantaṃ, asaññataṃ aparicakkhitāraṃ; Bhayaṃ tamanveti sayaṃ abodhaṃ, nāgaṃ yathā paṇḍarakaṃ supaṇṇo.

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto

records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Yo guyhamantaṃ parirakkhaṇeyyaṃ, mohā naro saṃsati hāsamāno; Taṃ bhinnamantaṃ bhayamanveti khippaṃ, nāgaṃ yathā paṇḍarakaṃ supaṇṇo.

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto

records.evidence_pali: …khissatī’’ti puggalaṃ oloketuṃ upaparikkhituṃ asakkontaṃ. Saṃsati hāsamānoti rakkhituṃ asamatthassa pāpapurisassa hāsamāno katheti. Nānumittoti anuvattanamattena yo mitto, na hadayena, so guyhaṃ atthaṃ jānituṃ nārahat…

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto

Idaṃ vuttaṃ hoti – nāgarāja, loke amaropi natthi, paññāvidhāpi atthi, sā aññesaṃ paññākoṭṭhāsasaṅkhātā paññāvidhā attano jīvitahetu na ninditabbāti. Atha vā paññāvidhāti paññāsadisā na ninditabbā nāma aññā d…

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto

Dujivhāti paṇḍarakanāgaṃ ālapati. Byavajantīti paṭikkamanti. Āsīvisā vā riva sattusaṅghāti ettha vāti nipātamattaṃ, āsīvisā sattusaṅghā rivāti attho. Yathā āsīvisato sattusaṅghā jīvitukāmā manussā ārā paṭ…

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto

Kathaṃkaroti idaṃ nāgarājā tassa naggassa samaṇabhāvaṃ ñatvā samaṇapaṭipattiṃ pucchanto āha. Tattha kiṃsīloti katarena ācārena samannāgato. Kena vatenāti katarena vatasamādānena vattanto. Samaṇo caranti pab…

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: Tattha icceva vākyanti iti evaṃ vacanaṃ vatvā taṃ nāgarājaṃ vissajji. Bhumyanti so sayampi bhūmiyaṃ patiṭṭhāya dijo taṃ dujivhaṃ samassāsento mutto ajja tvaṃ ito paṭṭhāya sabbabhayāni ativatto thale ca udake ca mayā abhigutto rakkhito hohī…

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.claim: the Paṇḍara nāga, sensing a garuḍa, made a huge body, raised hood (phaṇa) and coils (bhoga), swallowed stones
records.evidence_pali: Gaccha tvanti uyyojesi. So nāgarājā nāgabhavanaṃ pāvisi. Itaropi supaṇṇabhavanaṃ gantvā ‘‘mayā paṇḍarakanāgo sapathaṃ katvā saddahāpetvā vissajjito, kīdisaṃ nu kho mayi tassa hadayaṃ, vīmaṃsissāmi na’’nti nāgabhavanaṃ gantvā supaṇṇavātaṃ akāsi. Taṃ disvā nāgo ‘‘supaṇṇarājā maṃ gahetuṃ āgato bhavissatī’’ti maññamāno byāmasahassamattaṃ attabhāvaṃ māpetvā pāsāṇe ca vālukañca gilitvā bhāriyo hutvā naṅguṭṭhaṃ heṭṭhākatvā bhogamatthake phaṇa…

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: Taṃ sutvā nāgarājā tisso gāthā abhāsi –

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: Gantvā ca pana supaṇṇarājā cintesi – ‘‘ayaṃ nāgarājā acelakassa jīvitaṃ na dassati, etaṃ dussīlaṃ na vandissāmī’’ti. So bahi ṭhatvā nāgarājānameva tassa santikaṃ pesesi. Taṃ sandhāya satthā itaraṃ gāthamāha.

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: Taṃ sutvā nāgarājā dve gāthā abhāsi –

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: Iti nāgarājassa sapantasseva acelakassa sīsaṃ sattadhā phali. Nisinnaṭṭhāneyevassa bhūmi vivaraṃ adāsi. So pathaviṃ pavisitvā avīcimhi nibbatti, nāgarājasupaṇṇarājānopi attano bhavanameva agamiṃsu. Satthā tassa pathaviṃ paviṭṭhabhāvaṃ pakāsento osānagāthamāha –

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: Tattha tasmāti yasmā mittadubbhikammassa pharuso vipāko, tasmā. Āsittasattoti āsittavisena satto. Indassāti nāgindassa vākyena. Saṃvaroti ‘‘ahaṃ saṃvare ṭhitosmī’’ti paṭiññāya evaṃ paññāto ājīvako hatoti.

records.title: 16. Tiṃsanipāto
records.claim: Jātaka-identification: the nāga-king was Sāriputta, the supaṇṇa-king was the bodhisatta.
records.evidence_pali: …atthā imaṃ dhammadesanaṃ āharitvā ‘‘na, bhikkhave, idāneva, pubbepi devadatto musāvādaṃ katvā pathaviṃ paviṭṭhoyevā’’ti vatvā jātakaṃ samodhānesi – ‘‘tadā acelako devadatto ahosi, nāgarājā sāriputto, supaṇṇarājā pana ahameva ahosi’’nti.

records.evidence_pali: Ariyāvakāsosīti idaṃ satthā jetavane viharanto uposathakammaṃ ārabbha kathesi. Tadā hi satthā uposathike upāsake sampahaṃsetvā ‘‘porāṇakapaṇḍitā mahatiṃ nāgasampattiṃ pahāya uposathavāsaṃ upavasiṃsuyevā’’ti vatvā tehi yācito atītaṃ āhari.

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: …ṇṇaveṇṇāya nadiyā nivattane candakapabbataṃ upanissāya paṇṇasālaṃ katvā tattha vasanto kasiṇaparikammaṃ katvā jhānābhiññā nibbattetvā uñchācariyāya yāpesi. Tamenaṃ saṅkhapālo nāma nāgarājā mahantena parivārena kaṇṇaveṇṇanadito nikkhamitvā antarantarā upasaṅkamati. So tassa dhammaṃ desesi. Athassa putto pitaraṃ daṭṭhukāmo gataṭṭhānaṃ ajānanto anuvicārāpetvā ‘‘asukaṭṭ…

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.claim: A man who gave dāna, kept sīla and uposatha aspiring to the nāga-world was reborn in the nāgabhavana as Saṅkhapāla nāgarāja.
records.evidence_pali: …aṃ āgacchantaṃ disvā isiṃ vanditvā uṭṭhāyāsanā pakkāmi. Rājā pitaraṃ vanditvā paṭisanthāraṃ katvā nisīditvā pucchi – ‘‘bhante, katararājā nāmesa tumhākaṃ santikaṃ āgato’’ti. Tāta, saṅkhapālanāgarājā nāmesoti. So tassa sampattiṃ nissāya nāgabhavane lobhaṃ katvā katipāhaṃ vasitvā pitu bhikkhāhāraṃ nibaddhaṃ dāpetvā attano nagarameva gantvā catūsu dvāresu dānasālāyo kāretvā sakalajambudīpaṃ saṅkhobhento dānaṃ datvā sīlaṃ rakkhitvā uposathakammaṃ katvā nāgabhavanaṃ patthetvā āyupariyosāne nāgabhava

records.evidence_pali: …vāsino soḷasa janā ‘‘maṃsaṃ āharissāmā’’ti āvudhahatthā araññe vicarantā kiñci alabhitvā nikkhantā taṃ vammikamatthake nipannaṃ disvā ‘‘mayaṃ ajja godhāpotakampi na labhimhā, imaṃ nāgarājānaṃ vadhitvā khādissāmā’’ti cintetvā ‘‘mahā kho panesa gayhamāno palāyeyya, yathānipannameva taṃ bhogesu sūlehi vijjhitvā dubbalaṃ katvā gaṇhissāmā’’ti sūlāni ādāya upasaṅkamiṃsu. records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.claim: 'if this huge serpent (uraga) is led off for food, I give 16 oxen - release the nāga'
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Sace ayaṃ nīyati bhojanatthā, pavaḍḍhakāyo urago mahanto; Dadāmi vo balibaddāni soḷasa, nāgaṃ imaṃ muñcatha bandhanasmā.

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Tadāssu te bandhanā mocayiṃsu, yaṃ natthuto paṭimokkassa pāse; Mutto ca so bandhanā nāgarājā, pakkāmi pācīnamukho muhuttaṃ.

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘So taṃ pavissa nacirassa nāgo, dibbena me pāturahū janinda; Upaṭṭhahī maṃ pitaraṃva putto, hadayaṅgamaṃ kaṇṇasukhaṃ bhaṇanto.

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.claim: The hunters (luddaputtaka) are said to be foes/predators of the nāgas (verino nāma) who hunt them for food
records.evidence_pali: …oti bhayajanakakāyo. Bhojaputtāti luddaputtake piyasamudācārenālapati. Videhaputtāti videharaṭṭhavāsitāya āḷāraṃ ālapiṃsu. Vikopayitvāti chinditvā. Mayañhi vo sattavoti mayaṃ pana nāgānaṃ verino nāma. Bhojanatthāti bhojanatthāya. Mittañca no hohīti tvaṃ amhākaṃ mitto hohi, kataguṇaṃ jāna.

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.claim: Hunters pin the Saṅkhapāla nāga-king down with thorned creepers; the bodhisatta endures torture rather than retaliate.
records.evidence_pali: Tadāssu teti, mahārāja, tehi bhojaputtehi evaṃ vutte ahaṃ tesaṃ soḷasa vāhagoṇe nivāsanapārupanāni pasataṃ pasataṃ suvaṇṇamāsake bhariyānañca nesaṃ vatthālaṅkāraṃ adāsiṃ, atha te saṅkhapālanāgarājānaṃ bhūmiyaṃ nipajjāpetvā attano kakkhaḷatāya sakaṇṭakakāḷavettalatāya koṭiyaṃ gahetvā ākaḍḍhituṃ ārabhiṃsu. Athāhaṃ nāgarājānaṃ kilamantaṃ disvā akilamentova asinā tā latā chinditvā dārakānaṃ kaṇṇavedhato vaṭṭinīharaṇaniyāmena adukkhāpento saṇikaṃ nīhariṃ, tasmiṃ kāle te bhojaputtā yaṃ bandhanaṃ assa

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.claim: The nāgabhavana is described as like Mt Sineru, a celestial Tāvatiṃsa-like palace-realm under the water.
records.evidence_pali: …assa nipaccakāraṃ dassetvā yāva naṅguṭṭhā otari, udake paviṭṭhaṭṭhānamevassa nibbhayaṃ ahosi, tasmā nittiṇṇabhayo patīto haṭṭhatuṭṭho pāvekkhīti. Pavissāti pavisitvā. Dibbena meti nāgabhavane pamādaṃ anāpajjitvā mayi kaṇṇaveṇṇatīraṃ anatikkanteyeva dibbena parivārena mama purato pāturahosi. Upaṭṭhahīti upāgami. Abbhantaroti hadayamaṃsasadiso. Tvaṃ mama bahupakāro, sakkāraṃ te karissāmi. Passa me nivesanānīti mama nāgabhavanaṃ passa. Masakkasāraṃ viyāti masakkasāro vuccati osakkanaparisakkanābhā

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: Mahārāja! Evaṃ vatvā so nāgarājā uttari attano nāgabhavanaṃ vaṇṇento gāthādvayamāha –

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.claim: The nāgabhavana has lapis-lazuli lotus pools, mango groves, sorrow-vanishing on entry.
records.evidence_pali: …ha jahanti sokanti yattha paviṭṭhamattāva nissokā honti. Anāvakulāti na avakulā akhāṇumā upari ukkulavikulabhāvarahitā vā samasaṇṭhitā. Veḷuriyūpanīlāti veḷuriyena upanīlā, tasmiṃ nāgabhavane veḷuriyamayā pasannasalilā nīlobhāsā anekavaṇṇakamaluppalasañchannā pokkharaṇīti attho. Catuddisanti tassā pokkharaṇiyā catūsu disāsu. Pakkā cāti tasmiṃ ambavane ambarukkhā pakkap…

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.claim: The nāgabhavana holds jewelled gabled mansions, silver doors, a thousand-pillared palace.
records.evidence_pali: …nnikāsanti pabhassaradassanaṃ. Rajataggaḷanti rajatadvārakavāṭaṃ. Maṇīmayāti evarūpā tattha kūṭāgārā ca gabbhā ca. Paripūrāti sampuṇṇā. So saṅkhapāloti, mahārāja, ahaṃ evaṃ tasmiṃ nāgabhavanaṃ vaṇṇente taṃ daṭṭhukāmo ahosiṃ, atha maṃ tattha netvā so saṅkhapālo hatthe gahetvā taramāno veḷuriyathambhehi sahassathambhaṃ pāsādaṃ āruyha yasmiṃ ṭhāne assa mahesī ahosi, taṃ ṭhānaṃ netīti dīpeti. Ekā cāti mayi pāsādaṃ abhiruḷhe ekā itthī aññehi maṇīhi jātimahantehi upetaṃ subhaṃ veḷuriyāsanaṃ tena nāga

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: …paṭṭhahunti anekasatehi turiyehi gandhabbaṃ kurumānā upaṭṭhahiṃsu. Bhattu mano viditvāti attano patino cittaṃ jānitvā. Tatuttarinti tato gandhabbakaraṇato uttariṃ. Maṃ nipatīti so nāgarājā maṃ upasaṅkami. Mahantaṃ dibbehīti mahantehi uḷārehi dibbehi kāmehi tehi ca anappakehi.

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.claim: Asks how the nāga (Saṅkhapāla) obtained his celestial palace/vimāna and divine pleasures
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Saṃvaccharaṃ dibbarasānubhutvā, tadāssuhaṃ uttarimajjhabhāsiṃ; Nāgassidaṃ kinti kathañca laddhaṃ, kathajjhagamāsi vimānaseṭṭhaṃ.

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Adhiccaladdhaṃ pariṇāmajaṃ te, sayaṃkataṃ udāhu devehi dinnaṃ; Pucchāmi taṃ nāgarājetamatthaṃ, kathajjhagamāsi vimānaseṭṭha’’nti.

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.claim: Gloss: by what karma did Saṅkhapāla-nāgarāja obtain his attainments and best vimāna
records.evidence_pali: Tattha dibbarasānubhutvāti dibbe kāmaguṇarase anubhavitvā. Tadāssuhanti tadā assu ahaṃ. Nāgassidanti bhadramukhassa saṅkhapālanāgarājassa idaṃ sampattijātaṃ kinti kiṃ nāma kammaṃ katvā kathañca katvā laddhaṃ, kathametaṃ vimānaseṭṭhaṃ tvaṃ ajjhagamāsi, iti naṃ ahaṃ pucchiṃ. Adhiccaladdhanti ahetunā laddhaṃ. Pariṇāmaj…

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Kiṃ te vataṃ kiṃ pana brahmacariyaṃ, kissa suciṇṇassa ayaṃ vipāko; Akkhāhi me nāgarājetamatthaṃ, kathaṃ nu te laddhamidaṃ vimānaṃ.

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.claim: Asks the nāga why, endowed with strength/beauty/wisdom, he practises ascetic observance (tapo)
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Ekāyane taṃ pathe addasaṃsu, balena vaṇṇena cupetarūpaṃ; Siriyā paññāya ca bhāvitosi, kiṃ patthayaṃ nāga tapo karosi.

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Deviddhipattosi mahānubhāvo, sabbehi kāmehi samaṅgibhūto; Pucchāmi taṃ nāgarājetamatthaṃ, seyyo ito kena manussaloko.

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Saṃvaccharo me vasato tavantike, annena pānena upaṭṭhitosmi; Āmantayitvāna palemi nāga, cirappavuṭṭhosmi ahaṃ janinda.

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Yathāpi mātū ca pitū agāre, putto piyo paṭivihito vaseyya; Tatopi mayhaṃ idhameva seyyo, cittañhi te nāga mayī pasannaṃ.

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.claim: As the nāga Saṅkhapāla the bodhisatta fulfilled all ten perfections (giving his body etc.).
records.evidence_pali: …pana saṅkhapāladhammadesanāya dasapi pāramiyo labbhanti. Tadā hi mahāsattena sarīrassa pariccattabhāvo dānapāramī nāma hoti, tathārūpenāpi visatejena sīlassa abhinnatā sīlapāramī, nāgabhavanato nikkhamitvā samaṇadhammakaraṇaṃ nekkhammapāramī, ‘idañcidañca kātuṃ vaṭṭatī’ti saṃvidahanaṃ paññāpāramī, adhivāsanavīriyaṃ vīriyapāramī, adhivāsanakhanti khantipāramī, saccasamādā…

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.claim: Purity/path-fruit-Nibbāna and the arising of Buddhas and paccekabuddhas happen only in the human world, not the nāga-realm.
records.evidence_pali: Surositoti suṭṭhu manulitto. Itoti imamhā nāgabhavanā manussaloko kena uttaritaro. Suddhīti maggaphalanibbānasaṅkhātā visuddhi. Saṃyamoti sīlaṃ. Idaṃ so manussalokeyeva buddhapaccekabuddhānaṃ uppattiṃ sandhāyāha. Kāhāmīti attano appa…

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: Evaṃ vatvā āḷāro ‘‘athāhaṃ, mahārāja, nāgarājānaṃ etadavocaṃ – ‘samma, nāhaṃ dhanenatthiko, pabbajituṃ pana icchāmī’ti pabbajitaparikkhāraṃ yācitvā teneva saddhiṃ nāgabhavanā nikkhamitvā taṃ nivattetvā himavantaṃ pavisitvā pabbajitomhī’’ti vatvā rañño dhammakathaṃ kathento gāthādvayamāha –

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Addhā have sevitabbā sapaññā, bahussutā ye bahuṭhānacintino; Nāgañca sutvāna tavañcaḷāra, kāhāmi puññāni anappakānī’’ti.

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: Tattha ye bahuṭhānacintinoti ye bahūni kāraṇāni jānanti. Nāgañcāti tathā appamādavihārinaṃ nāgarājānañca tava ca vacanaṃ sutvā.

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Addhā have sevitabbā sapaññā, bahussutā ye bahuṭhānacintino; Nāgañca sutvāna mamañca rāja, karohi puññāni anappakānī’’ti.

records.title: 17. Cattālīsanipāto
records.claim: Jātaka-identification: the Saṅkhapāla nāga-king was the bodhisatta (myself).
records.evidence_pali: Satthā imaṃ dhammadesanaṃ āharitvā jātakaṃ samodhānesi – ‘‘tadā pitā tāpaso kassapo ahosi, bārāṇasirājā ānando, āḷāro sāriputto, saṅkhapālanāgarājā pana ahameva ahosi’’nti.

records.title: 21. Asītinipāto
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Ahaṃ khalu mahārāja, nāgarājārivantaraṃ; Paṭivattuṃ na sakkomi, na me so vinayo siyā.

records.title: 21. Asītinipāto
records.evidence_pali: Tattha nāgarājārivantaranti peḷāya abbhantaraṃ paviṭṭho nāgarājā viya. Paṭivattunti tumhākaṃ dvinnaṃ antare vattuṃ na sakkomi. Na me soti sace vadeyyaṃ, na me so vinayo bhaveyya. Amhākañcevāti channavutiyā haṃsasahassānaṃ. Uttamasattavoti uttam…

records.title: 21. Asītinipāto
records.claim: One makes bali-offerings to nāgas and yakkhas at sea-pools, ponds and rivers (their watery haunts)
records.evidence_pali: Tāsaṃ attho – yo puriso ‘‘nāgayakkhādīnaṃ balikammaṃ karomī’’ti samuddasoṇḍipokkharaṇīādīsu yaṃ kiñci sarañca upagantvā juhati, tattha balikammaṃ karoti, tathā bahukāya nadiyā gayāya pokkharaṇiyā doṇanāmake ca timbarunāma…

records.title: 21. Asītinipāto
records.evidence_pali: …‘ajja kuṇālo sakuṇarājā himavante manosilāsane nisīditvā buddhalīlāya dhammaṃ desessati, taṃ suṇāthā’’ti. Paramparaghosena cha kāmāvacaradevā sutvā yebhuyyena tattha sannipatiṃsu. Bahunāgasupaṇṇakinnaravijjādharādīnampi devatā tamatthaṃ ugghosesuṃ. Tadā ānando nāma gijjharājā dasasahassagijjhaparivāro gijjhapabbate paṭivasati. Sopi taṃ kolāhalaṃ sutvā ‘‘dhammaṃ suṇissāmī’’ti saparivāro āgantvā ek…

records.title: 22. Mahānipāto
records.claim: The king reasons: if a deva, he will fly up; if a nāga, he will sink into the earth — distinguishing nāga by its earth-entering power
records.evidence_pali: …apetvā hatthena gahetvā nadītitthaṃ agamāsi. Rājā koṭṭhake ṭhitova taṃ tathā āgacchantaṃ disvā ‘‘mayā ettakaṃ kālaṃ evaṃ vicarantenapi manusso nāma na diṭṭhapubbo, devo nu kho esa nāgo nu kho, sace panāhaṃ etaṃ upasaṅkamitvā pucchissāmi. Devo ce bhavissati, ākāsaṃ uppatissati. Nāgo ce, bhūmiyaṃ pavisissati. Na kho panāhaṃ sabbakālaṃ himavanteyeva vicarissāmi, bārāṇasiṃ gamissāmi. Tatra maṃ pucchissanti ‘api nu kho te, mahārāja, himavante vasantena kiñci acha…

records.title: 22. Mahānipāto
records.claim: Gloss: both devas and nāgas speak in human language; the king cannot tell if the being is deva, nāga, or human
records.evidence_pali: Tattha rājāhamasmīti evaṃ kirassa vitakko ahosi ‘‘devāpi nāgāpi manussabhāsāya kathentiyeva, ahametaṃ devoti vā nāgoti vā manussoti vā na jānāmi. Sace kujjheyya, nāseyya maṃ, ‘rājā’ti vutte pana abhāyanto nāma natthī’’ti. Tasmā attano rājabhāvaṃ jānāpetuṃ paṭhamaṃ ‘‘rājāhamasmī’’ti āha. Lobhāti mi…

records.title: 22. Mahānipāto
records.claim: Lists deva, nāga, kinnara, khattiya etc. as kinds of being one might claim to be
records.evidence_pali: Taṃ sutvā mahāsatto ‘‘sacāhaṃ ‘devanāgakinnarakhattiyādīsu aññatarohamasmī’ti katheyyaṃ, saddaheyyeva esa, saccameva panassa kathetuṃ vaṭṭatī’’ti cintetvā evamāha –

records.title: 22. Mahānipāto
records.evidence_pali: Tattha manussassevāti nāyaṃ sīhabyagghadīpiyakkhanāgakinnarānaṃ, āgacchato pana manussassevāyaṃ padasaddo, neso sāmassāti. Santaṃ hīti upasamayuttaṃ eva. Vajatīti caṅkamati. Neyatīti patiṭṭhāpeti.

records.title: Mahāvanavaṇṇanā
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Caṅkorā kukkuṭā nāgā, aññamaññaṃ pakūjino; Bakā balākā najjuhā, dindibhā kuñjavājitā.

records.title: Mahāvanavaṇṇanā
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Eṇeyyapasadākiṇṇaṃ, nāgasaṃsevitaṃ vanaṃ; Nānālatāhi sañchannaṃ, kadalīmigasevitaṃ.

records.title: Dārakapabbavaṇṇanā
records.claim: The nāga-clans (nāgakulāni) that guard the lotus-lake are honoured/saluted as resident deities of the water
records.evidence_pali: Tattha pādakāti khuddakapādā. Okandāmaseti avakandāma, apacitiṃ nīcavuttiṃ dassentā jānāpema. Sarassāti imassa padumasarassa pariggāhakāneva nāgakulāni sirasā vandāma. Supatitthe ca āpaketi supatitthāya nadiyā adhivatthā devatāpi vandāma. Tiṇalatānīti tiṇāni ca olambakalatāyo ca. Osadhyoti osadhiyo. Sabbattha adhivatthā devatā sa…

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: A widowed nāga-maiden leaves the nāgabhavana, roams the seashore in human-like form, and follows a prince's footprints.
records.evidence_pali: …tvā pitaraṃ vanditvā nikkhamitvā anupubbena yamunaṃ gantvā yamunāya ca samuddassa ca pabbatassa ca antare paṇṇasālaṃ māpetvā vanamūlaphalāhāro paṭivasati. Tadā samuddassa heṭṭhime nāgabhavane ekā matapatikā nāgamāṇavikā aññāsaṃ sapatikānaṃ yasaṃ oloketvā kilesaṃ nissāya nāgabhavanā nikkhamitvā samuddatīre vicarantī rājaputtassa padavalañjaṃ disvā padānusārena gantvā taṃ paṇṇasālaṃ addasa. Tadā rājaputto phalāphalatthāya gato hoti. Sā paṇṇasālaṃ pavisitvā kaṭ…

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.evidence_pali: …’’nti na saddhāpabbajitabhāvena somanassajāto pupphasayane parivattitvā nipanno niddaṃ okkamitvā punadivase sūriyuggamane uṭṭhāya paṇṇasālaṃ asammajjitvā phalāphalatthāya agamāsi. Nāgamāṇavikā tasmiṃ khaṇe āgantvā milātāni pupphāni disvā ‘‘kāmādhimutto esa, na saddhāpabbajito, sakkā naṃ gaṇhitu’’nti ñatvā purāṇapupphāni nīharitvā aññāni pupphāni āharitvā tatheva navapupphasayanaṃ sajjetvā paṇṇasālaṃ alaṅkaritvā caṅkame pupphāni vikiritvā nāgabhavanameva gatā. So taṃ divasampi pupphasayane sayit

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: The nāga-maiden conceives by the human prince and bears a son and daughter (human-natured children).
records.evidence_pali: Aparabhāge nāgamāṇavikā gabbhaṃ paṭilabhitvā puttaṃ vijāyi, sāgaratīre jātattā tassa ‘‘sāgarabrahmadatto’’ti nāmaṃ kariṃsu. Tassa padasā gamanakāle nāgamāṇavikā dhītaraṃ vijāyi, tassā samuddatīre jātattā ‘‘samuddajā’’ti nāmaṃ kariṃsu. Atheko bārāṇasivāsiko vanacarako taṃ ṭhānaṃ patvā katapaṭisanthāro rājaputtaṃ sañjānitvā katipāhaṃ tattha…

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: The nāga-children are human-natured by their father's seed but are water-born and could die of sun/wind on the road.
records.evidence_pali: …viya vippakirissati. Iminā kāraṇena na sakkā mayā gantu’’nti. Rājaputto punadivasepi yācateva. Atha naṃ sā evamāha – ‘‘ahaṃ tāva kenaci pariyāyena na gamissāmi, ime pana me puttā nāgakumārā tava sambhavena jātattā manussajātikā. Sace te mayi sineho atthi, imesu appamatto bhava. Ime kho pana udakabījakā sukhumālā maggaṃ gacchantā vātātapena kilamitvā mareyyuṃ, tasmā e…

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.evidence_pali: Sā evañca pana vatvā rājaputtaṃ vanditvā padakkhiṇaṃ katvā puttake āliṅgitvā thanantare nipajjāpetvā sīse cumbitvā rājaputtassa niyyādetvā roditvā kanditvā tattheva antaradhāyitvā nāgabhavanaṃ agamāsi. Rājaputtopi domanassappatto assupuṇṇehi nettehi nivesanā nikkhamitvā akkhīni puñchitvā amacce upasaṅkami. Te taṃ tattheva abhisiñcitvā ‘‘deva, amhākaṃ nagaraṃ gacchāmā’’t…

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.evidence_pali: …sakkā itarā kammakāraṇā sahituṃ, ayaṃ pana atikakkhaḷo, mā evaṃ avacā’’ti. Taṃ sutvā rājā ‘‘imaṃ etadeva kāretuṃ vaṭṭatī’’ti yamunāya āvaṭṭe khipāpesi. Puriso tathā akāsi. So ekaṃ nāgabhavanagāmiṃ udakavāhaṃ patvā nāgabhavanaṃ agamāsi.

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: Bhūridatta frame: Dhataraṭṭha the nāga-king; nāga-youths (nāgamāṇavaka) leave the nāga-realm (nāgabhavana) taking a tortoise; the nāga king arranges marriage of his daughter Samuddajā
records.evidence_pali: …ṃ vaṇṇesi. Atha naṃ dhataraṭṭho pucchi ‘‘kena panatthena raññā pesitosī’’ti. Mahārāja, rājā maṃ evamāha ‘‘mayā sakalajambudīpe rājūhi saddhiṃ mittadhammo kato, idāni dhataraṭṭhena nāgaraññā saddhiṃ mittadhammaṃ kātuṃ mama dhītaraṃ samuddajaṃ dammī’’ti vatvā maṃ pahiṇi. ‘‘Tumhe papañcaṃ akatvā mayā saddhiṃyeva purisaṃ pesetvā divasaṃ vavatthapetvā dārikaṃ gaṇhathā’’ti. So tussitvā tassa sakkāraṃ katvā tena saddhiṃ cattāro nāgamāṇavake pesesi ‘‘gacchatha, rañño vacanaṃ sutvā divasaṃ vavatthapetvā

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.evidence_pali: Kacchapo yamunāya bārāṇasiyā ca antare ekaṃ padumasaraṃ disvā ekenupāyena palāyitukāmo evamāha – ‘‘bho nāgamāṇavakā, amhākaṃ rājā puttadārā cassa maṃ udake gocarattā rājanivesanaṃ āgataṃ disvāva padumāni no dehi, bhisamūlāni dehīti yācanti. Ahaṃ tesaṃ atthāya tāni gaṇhissāmi, ettha maṃ vissajje…

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: We have never made a marriage-alliance with nāgas before; how shall we make such an ill-matched marriage?
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Na no vivāho nāgehi, katapubbo kudācanaṃ; Taṃ vivāhaṃ asaṃyuttaṃ, kathaṃ amhe karomase’’ti.

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.evidence_pali: Taṃ sutvā nāgamāṇavakā ‘‘sace te dhataraṭṭhena saddhiṃ sambandho ananucchaviko, atha kasmā attano upaṭṭhākaṃ cittacūḷaṃ nāma kacchapaṃ ‘samuddajaṃ nāma te dhītaraṃ dammī’ti amhākaṃ rañño pesesi? Evaṃ pesetvā idāni te amhākaṃ rājānaṃ paribhavaṃ karontassa kattabbayuttakaṃ mayaṃ jānissāma. Mayañhi nāgamāṇavakā’’ti vatvā rājānaṃ tajjentā dve gāthā abhāsiṃsu –

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: When a nāga (Dhataraṭṭha) is angered, such men do not live long
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Jīvitaṃ nūna te cattaṃ, raṭṭhaṃ vā manujādhipa; Na hi nāge kupitamhi, ciraṃ jīvanti tādisā.

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: Gloss: when so mighty a nāga (Varuṇa-nāgarāja) is angered men cannot live long, they perish; identifies Varuṇa nāgarāja
records.evidence_pali: Tattha raṭṭhaṃ vāti ekaṃsena tayā jīvitaṃ vā raṭṭhaṃ vā cattaṃ. Tādisāti tumhādisā evaṃ mahānubhāve nāge kupite ciraṃ jīvituṃ na sakkonti, antarāva antaradhāyanti. Yo tvaṃ, deva, manussosīti deva, yo tvaṃ manusso samāno. Varuṇassāti varuṇanāgarājassa. Niyaṃ puttanti ajjhattikaputtaṃ. Yāmunanti yamunāya heṭṭhā jātaṃ.

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: Dhataraṭṭha is overlord (issaro) of many nāgas
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Nātimaññāmi rājānaṃ, dhataraṭṭhaṃ yasassinaṃ; Dhataraṭṭho hi nāgānaṃ, bahūnamapi issaro.

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: Despite great power, the nāga-king is unworthy of the human princess because of his snake-birth (ahijātikattā).
records.evidence_pali: Tattha bahūnamapīti pañcayojanasatikassa nāgabhavanassa issarabhāvaṃ sandhāyevamāha. Na me dhītaramārahoti evaṃ mahānubhāvopi pana so ahijātikattā mama dhītaraṃ araho na hoti. ‘‘Khattiyo ca videhāna’’nti idaṃ mātipakkhe ñātake dassento…

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.evidence_pali: Nāgamāṇavakā taṃ tattheva nāsāvātena māretukāmā hutvāpi ‘‘amhākaṃ divasaṃ vavatthāpanatthāya pesitā, imaṃ māretvā gantuṃ na yuttaṃ, gantvā rañño ācikkhitvā jānissāmā’’ti tattheva antarahitā ‘‘…

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: Let the Kambala and Assatara nāgas rise up; announce to all nāgas to overspread Bārāṇasī but harm no one
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Kambalassatarā uṭṭhentu, sabbe nāge nivedaya; Bārāṇasiṃ pavajjantu, mā ca kañci viheṭhayu’’nti.

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: Gloss: the Kambala-Assatara nāgas dwelling at the foot of Sineru (sinerupāde vasananāgā), the king's maternal kin, are summoned; their breath-blast can reduce the city to ash
records.evidence_pali: Tattha kambalassatarā uṭṭhentūti kambalassatarā nāma tassa mātupakkhikā sinerupāde vasananāgā, te ca uṭṭhahantu. Aññe ca catūsu disāsu anudisāsu yattakā vā mayhaṃ vacanakarā, te sabbe nāge nivedaya, gantvā jānāpetha, khippaṃ kira sannipātethāti āṇāpento evamāha. Tato sabbeheva sīghaṃ sannipatitehi ‘‘kiṃ karoma, devā’’ti vutte ‘‘sabbepi te nāgā bārāṇasiṃ pavajjantū’’ti āha. ‘‘Tattha gantvā kiṃ kātabbaṃ, deva, taṃ nāsāvātappahārena bhasmaṃ karomā’’ti ca vutte rājadhītari paṭibaddhacittatāya tassā

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.evidence_pali: Atha naṃ nāgā ‘‘sace koci manusso na viheṭhetabbo, tattha gantvā kiṃ karissāmā’’ti āhaṃsu. Atha ne ‘‘idañcidañca karotha, ahampi idaṃ nāma karissāmī’’ti ācikkhanto gāthādvayamāha –

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: The nāgas, becoming huge-bodied (vitatasarīrā mahāsarīrā), hang from doorways and lie in the water and on land throughout the city
records.evidence_pali: Tattha sobbhesūti pokkharaṇīsu. Rathiyāti rathikāya. Vitatāti vitatasarīrā mahāsarīrā hutvā etesu ceva nivesanādīsu dvāratoraṇesu ca olambantu, ettakaṃ nāgā karontu, karontā ca nivesane tāva mañcapīṭhānaṃ heṭṭhā ca upari ca antogabbhabahigabbhādīsu ca pokkharaṇiyaṃ udakapiṭṭhe rathikādīnaṃ passesu ceva thalesu ca mahantāni sarīrāni mā…

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.evidence_pali: Atha sabbe nāgā tathā akaṃsu. Tamatthaṃ pakāsento satthā āha –

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: Seeing the nāgas hanging coiled (soṇḍikate) and breathing/hissing again and again, the women wailed
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Tesu disvāna lambante, puthū kandiṃsu nāriyo; Nāge soṇḍikate disvā, passasante muhuṃ muhuṃ.

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: The four nāga-youths (nāgamāṇavaka), as envoys, encircled the king's bed, made great hoods (phaṇa) over his head and stood with bared fangs hissing
records.evidence_pali: …ṃsu. Pavajjiṃsūti aḍḍharattasamaye pavisiṃsu. Lambiṃsūti dhataraṭṭhena vuttaniyāmeneva te sabbesu ṭhānesu manussānaṃ sañcāraṃ pacchinditvā olambiṃsu. Dūtā hutvā āgatā pana cattāro nāgamāṇavakā raño sayanassa cattāro pāde parikkhipitvā uparisīse mahante phaṇe katvā tuṇḍehi sīsaṃ paharantā viya dāṭhā vivaritvā passasantā aṭṭhaṃsu. Dhataraṭṭhopi attanā vuttaniyāmena nagara…

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: At dawn, the city heaved as if upturned by the nāgas' breath-blast; the people cry 'nāga-kings, why do you harry us?'
records.evidence_pali: Pakkandunti vibhātāya rattiyā nāgānaṃ assāsavātena sakalanagare rājanivesane ca uppātiyamāne viya bhītā manussā ‘‘nāgarājāno kissa no viheṭhathā’’ti vatvā tumhākaṃ rājā ‘‘dhītaraṃ dassāmī’’ti dhataraṭṭhassa dūtaṃ pesetvā puna tassa dūtehi āgantvā ‘‘dehī’’ti vutto amhākaṃ rājānaṃ akkosati paribhāsati. ‘‘…

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: Nāga-kings receive the princess; nāga-maidens disguise themselves as human attendants; she feels divine touch on the celestial bed.
records.evidence_pali: …agaraṃ, ukkaṇṭhitakāleyeva idha āgantuṃ sakkā, ettha gantabba’’nti saññāpetvā sīsaṃ nhāpetvā sabbālaṅkārehi alaṅkaritvā paṭicchannayogge nisīdāpetvā amaccānaṃ hatthe datvā pāhesi. Nāgarājāno paccuggamanaṃ katvā mahāsakkāraṃ kariṃsu. Amaccā nagaraṃ pavisitvā taṃ tassa datvā bahuṃ dhanaṃ ādāya nivattiṃsu. Te rājadhītaraṃ pāsādaṃ āropetvā alaṅkatadibbasayane nipajjāpesuṃ. Taṅkhaṇaññeva naṃ nāgamāṇavikā khujjādivesaṃ gahetvā manussaparicārikā viya parivārayiṃsu. Sā dibbasayane nipannamattāva dibbap

records.title: Nagarakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: Dhataraṭṭha vanished with his nāga-retinue and reappeared in the nāga-realm (nāgabhavana), a 500-yojana realm adorned like a deva-city with jewelled palaces
records.evidence_pali: Dhataraṭṭho taṃ gahetvā saddhiṃ nāgaparisāya tattha antarahito nāgabhavaneyeva pāturahosi. Rājadhītā pabujjhitvā alaṅkatadibbasayanaṃ aññe ca suvaṇṇapāsādamaṇipāsādādayo uyyānapokkharaṇiyo alaṅkatadevanagaraṃ viya nāgabhavanaṃ disvā khujjādiparicārikāyo pucchi ‘‘idaṃ nagaraṃ ativiya alaṅkataṃ, na amhākaṃ nagaraṃ viya, kasseta’’nti. ‘‘Sāmikassa te santakaṃ, devi, na appapuññā evarūpaṃ sampattiṃ labhanti, mahāpuññatāya te ayaṃ laddhā’’ti. Dhataraṭṭhopi pañcayojanasatike nāgabhavane bheriṃ carāpesi

records.title: Uposathakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: The nāginī (Samuddajā) bore four sons but did not know she was in the nāga-realm; the young nāga Ariṭṭha tests his mother by manifesting a serpent-body (sappasarīra) while suckling
records.evidence_pali: …ṃ akaṃsu. So pana bodhisatto. Punekaṃ puttaṃ vijāyi, tassa ‘‘subhogo’’ti nāmaṃ kariṃsu. Aparampi puttaṃ vijāyi, tassa ‘‘ariṭṭho’’ti nāmaṃ kariṃsu. Iti sā cattāro putte vijāyitvāpi nāgabhavanabhāvaṃ na jānāti. Athekadivasaṃ taruṇanāgā ariṭṭhassa ācikkhiṃsu ‘‘tava mātā manussitthī, na nāginī’’ti. Ariṭṭho ‘‘vīmaṃsissāmi na’’nti ekadivasaṃ thanaṃ pivantova sappasarīraṃ māpetvā naṅguṭṭhakhaṇḍena mātu piṭṭhipāde ghaṭṭesi. Sā tassa sappasarīraṃ disvā bhītatasitā mahāravaṃ…

records.title: Uposathakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: Their father gave each son a hundred-yojana realm; thousands of nāga-maidens (nāgakaññāsahassāni) attend; Bhūridatta attends Virūpakkha and goes with the nāga-retinue to Tāvatiṃsa to serve Sakka
records.evidence_pali: Atha nesaṃ pitā yojanasatikaṃ yojanasatikaṃ katvā rajjamadāsi, mahanto yaso ahosi. Soḷasa soḷasa nāgakaññāsahassāni parivārayiṃsu. Pitu ekayojanasatikameva rajjaṃ ahosi. Tayo puttā māse māse mātāpitaro passituṃ āgacchanti, bodhisatto pana anvaddhamāsaṃ āgacchati. Nāgabhavane samuṭṭhitaṃ pañhaṃ bodhisattova katheti. Pitarā saddhiṃ virūpakkhamahārājassapi upaṭṭhānaṃ gacchati, tassa santike samuṭṭhitaṃ pañhampi sova katheti. Athekadivasaṃ virūpakkhe nāgaparisāya saddhiṃ tidasapuraṃ gantvā sakkaṃ pa

records.title: Uposathakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: The nāga-king (Bhūridatta) undertakes the four-factored uposatha on an anthill, offering his skin/sinew/bone/blood, keeping the observance for a long time.
records.evidence_pali: …athakamme kate aruṇuggamanavelāyameva tumhe dasa dasa itthiyo ādāya vārena vārena tūriyahatthā mama santikaṃ āgantvā maṃ gandhehi ca pupphehi ca pūjetvā gāyitvā naccitvā maṃ ādāya nāgabhavanameva āgacchathā’’ti vatvā tattha gantvā vammikamatthake bhoge ābhujitvā ‘‘yo mama cammaṃ vā nhāruṃ vā aṭṭhiṃ vā ruhiraṃ vā icchati, so āharatū’’ti caturaṅgasamannāgataṃ uposathaṃ adhiṭṭhāya naṅgalasīsappamāṇaṃ sarīraṃ māpetvā nipanno uposathakammamakāsi. Aruṇe uṭṭhahanteyeva taṃ nāgamāṇavikā āgantvā yathānu

records.title: Garuḷakhaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: The bodhisatta-nāga makes his snake body vanish and manifests an adorned divine (human-form) body; nāga-maidens worship him.
records.evidence_pali: Tasmiṃ khaṇe nāgamāṇavikāyo āgantvā bodhisattassa pupphāsanaṃ paññāpesuṃ. So ahisarīraṃ antaradhāpetvā sabbālaṅkārapaṭimaṇḍitaṃ dibbasarīraṃ māpetvā sakkalīlāya pupphāsane nisīdi. Nāgamāṇavikāpi naṃ gandhamālādīhi pūjetvā dibbatūriyāni vādetvā naccagītaṃ paṭṭhapesuṃ. Brāhmaṇo taṃ saddaṃ sutvā ‘‘ko nu kho esa, jānissāmi na’’nti cintetvā ‘‘putta, puttā’’ti vatvāpi puttaṃ pabodhetuṃ asakkonto ‘‘sayatu esa, kilanto bhavissati, ahameva gamissāmī’’ti rukkhā oruyha tassa santikaṃ agamāsi. Nāgamāṇavikā

records.title: Garuḷakhaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: Asks: are you a mighty yakkha, or are you a nāga of great power (nāgosi mahānubhāvo)?
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Ko tvaṃ brahābāhu vanassa majjhe, virocasi ghatasittova aggi; Mahesakkho aññatarosi yakkho, udāhu nāgosi mahānubhāvo’’ti.

records.title: Garuḷakhaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: The bodhisatta declares his true nāga-king status to the brahmin.
records.evidence_pali: Taṃ sutvā mahāsatto ‘‘sacepi ‘sakkādīsu aññatarohamasmī’ti vakkhāmi, saddahissatevāyaṃ brāhmaṇo, ajja pana mayā saccameva kathetuṃ vaṭṭatī’’ti cintetvā attano nāgarājabhāvaṃ kathento āha –

records.title: Garuḷakhaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: 'I am a nāga (nāgohamasmi), possessed of iddhi, fiery, hard to overcome; angered, I could blast even a prosperous country with my heat/venom (tejasā)'
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Nāgohamasmi iddhimā, tejassī duratikkamo; Ḍaṃseyyaṃ tejasā kuddho, phītaṃ janapadaṃ api.

records.title: Garuḷakhaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: The nāga claims that by his fiery power (tejas) he could reduce a whole country to ashes; he is known throughout the 500-league nāgabhavana.
records.evidence_pali: …ya saddhiṃ pathaviyā mama tejena so sabbo janapado bhasmā bhaveyyāti vadati. Sudassanakaniṭṭhosmīti ahaṃ mama bhātu sudassanassa kaniṭṭho asmi. Vidūti evaṃ mamaṃ pañcayojanasatike nāgabhavane jānantīti.

records.title: Garuḷakhaṇḍaṃ
records.evidence_pali: Idañca pana vatvā mahāsatto cintesi ‘‘ayaṃ brāhmaṇo caṇḍo pharuso, ahituṇḍikassa ārocetvā uposathakammassa me antarāyampi kareyya, yaṃ nūnāhaṃ imaṃ nāgabhavanaṃ netvā mahantaṃ yasaṃ datvā uposathakammaṃ addhaniyaṃ kareyya’’nti. Atha naṃ āha ‘‘brāhmaṇa, mahantaṃ te yasaṃ dassāmi, ramaṇīyaṃ nāgabhavanaṃ, ehi tattha gacchāmā’’ti. ‘‘Sāmi, putto me atthi, tasmiṃ gacchante āgamissāmī’’ti. Atha naṃ mahāsatto ‘‘gaccha, brāhmaṇa, ānehi na’’nti vatvā attano āvāsaṃ ācikkhanto āha –

records.title: Garuḷakhaṇḍaṃ
records.evidence_pali: Tattha tattha pattoti tvaṃ amhākaṃ nāgabhavanaṃ patto hutvā. Mayhanti mama santakehi kāmehi pūjito. Vacchasīti tattha nāgabhavane sukhaṃ vasissati.

records.title: Garuḷakhaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: Brought to the nāgabhavana, the brahmin and son receive divine bodies; the bodhisatta-nāga gives divine wealth and nāga-maidens, keeps the uposatha heedfully.
records.evidence_pali: Evaṃ vatvā mahāsatto ubhopi te pitāputte attano ānubhāvena nāgabhavanaṃ ānesi. Tesaṃ tattha dibbo attabhāvo pātubhavi. Atha nesaṃ mahāsatto dibbasampattiṃ datvā cattāri cattāri nāgakaññāsatāni adāsi. Te mahāsampattiṃ anubhaviṃsu. Bodhisattopi appamatto uposathakammaṃ akāsi. Anvaḍḍhamāsaṃ mātāpitūnaṃ upaṭṭhānaṃ gantvā dhammakathaṃ kathetvā tato ca brāhmaṇassa santikaṃ gantvā ārogyaṃ pucchitvā ‘‘yena te attho, taṃ vadeyyāsi, anukkaṇṭhamāno abhiramā’’ti vatvā somadattenapi saddhiṃ paṭisanthāraṃ kat

records.title: Garuḷakhaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: The nāga's mansion has lapis pillars, thousand-pillared palaces full of nāga-maidens, like Sakka's Vejayanta; his iddhi is vast.
records.evidence_pali: …channā udakapiṭṭhā. Sunimmitāti tava puññasampattiyā suṭṭhu nimmitā. Aṭṭhaṃsāti tava vasanapāsādesu aṭṭhaṃsā sukatā veḷuriyamayā thambhā. Tehi thambhehi sahassathambhā tava pāsādā nāgakaññāhi pūrā vijjotanti. Upapannosīti evarūpe vimāne nibbattosīti attho. Sahassanettassa vimānanti sakkassa vejayantapāsādaṃ. Iddhī hi tyāyaṃ vipulāti yasmā tavāyaṃ vipulā iddhi, tasmā tv…

records.title: Garuḷakhaṇḍaṃ
records.evidence_pali: Athassa tattha avasitukāmataṃ ñatvā mahāsatto nāgamāṇavake āṇāpetvā brāhmaṇaṃ manussalokaṃ pāpesi. Tamatthaṃ pakāsento satthā āha –

records.title: Garuḷakhaṇḍaṃ
records.evidence_pali: Tattha pāpesūti yamunāto uttāretvā bārāṇasimaggaṃ pāpayiṃsu, pāpayitvā ca pana ‘‘tumhe gacchathā’’ti vatvā nāgabhavanameva paccāgamiṃsu.

records.title: Garuḷakhaṇḍaṃ
records.evidence_pali: …mātā tesaṃ āgamanaṃ sutvā paccuggantvā gharaṃ netvā annapānena santappesi. Brāhmaṇo bhuñjitvā niddaṃ okkami. Itarā puttaṃ pucchi ‘‘tāta, ettakaṃ kālaṃ kuhiṃ gatatthā’’ti? ‘‘Amma, bhūridattanāgarājena amhe nāgabhavanaṃ nītā, tato ukkaṇṭhitvā idāni āgatā’’ti. ‘‘Kiñci pana vo ratanaṃ ābhata’’nti. ‘‘Nābhataṃ ammā’’ti. ‘‘Kiṃ tumhākaṃ tena kiñci na dinna’’nti. ‘‘Amma, bhūridattena me pitu sabbakāmadado maṇi dinno ahosi, iminā pana na gahito’’ti. ‘‘Kiṃkāraṇā’’ti. ‘‘Pabbajissati kirā’’ti. Sā ‘‘ettakaṃ

records.title: Garuḷakhaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: A garuḷa/supaṇṇa seized a nāga-king (nāgarājānaṃ) by the head from the sea and carried it off; the nāga wrapped its tail round a banyan to escape
records.evidence_pali: Tadā dakkhiṇamahāsamuddassa disābhāge simbalivāsī eko garuḷo pakkhavātehi samudde udakaṃ viyūhitvā ekaṃ nāgarājānaṃ sīse gaṇhi. Tadāhi supaṇṇā nāgaṃ gahetuṃ ajānanakāyeva, pacchā paṇḍarajātake jāniṃsu. So pana taṃ sīse gahetvāpi udake anottharanteyeva ukkhipitvā olambantaṃ ādāya himavantamatthakena pāyāsi. Tadā ceko kāsiraṭṭhavāsī brāhmaṇo isipabbajjaṃ pabbajitvā himavantappadese paṇṇasālaṃ māpetvā paṭivasati. Tassa caṅkamanakoṭiyaṃ mahānigrodharukkho atthi. So tassa mūle divāvihāraṃ karoti. Sup

records.title: Garuḷakhaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: Gloss on the garuḷa carrying off the nāga for food (bhojanatthāya nāgaṃ haranto); discusses karma of seizing the nāga
records.evidence_pali: …iṃ khaṇe tāpaso taṃ ṭhānaṃ samaṃ karoti. Supaṇṇarājā tāpasaṃ vanditvā ekamantaṃ nisinno ajānanto viya ‘‘kissa ṭhānaṃ, bhante, ida’’nti pucchi. ‘‘Upāsaka, eko supaṇṇo bhojanatthāya nāgaṃ haranto nāgena mokkhatthāya nigrodhaviṭapaṃ naṅguṭṭhena veṭhitāyapi attano mahabbalatāya pakkhantitvā gato, atha nigrodharukkho uppāṭito, idaṃ tassa uppāṭitaṭṭhāna’’nti. ‘‘Kiṃ pana, bhante, tassa supaṇṇassa akusalaṃ hoti, udāhu no’’ti? ‘‘Sace na jānāti, acetanakammaṃ nāma akusalaṃ na hotī’’ti. ‘‘Kiṃ nāgassa pana

records.title: Kīḷanakaṇḍaṃ
records.evidence_pali: Tasmiṃ kāle sahassamattā bhūridattassa paricārikā nāgamāṇavikā taṃ sabbakāmadadaṃ maṇiratanaṃ ādāya nāgabhavanā nikkhamitvā yamunātīre vālukarāsimhi ṭhapetvā tassa obhāsena sabbarattiṃ udakakīḷaṃ kīḷitvā aruṇuggamane sabbālaṅkārena alaṅkaritvā maṇiratanaṃ parivāretvā siriṃ pavesayamānā nisīdiṃsu. Brāhmaṇopi mantaṃ sajjhāyanto taṃ ṭhānaṃ pāpuṇi. Tā mantasaddaṃ sutvāva ‘‘iminā supaṇṇena bhavitabba’’nti maraṇabhayatajjitā maṇiratanaṃ aggahetvā pathaviyaṃ nimujjitvā nāgabhavanaṃ agamiṃsu. Brāhmaṇopi

records.title: Kīḷanakaṇḍaṃ
records.evidence_pali: Tassattho – ahaṃ ajja kālaṃ pātova pathaṃ maggaṃ gacchanto rattakkhikāhi sahassamattāhi nāgamāṇavikāhi samantā parivāritaṃ imaṃ maṇiṃ ajjhagā. Maṃ disvā hi sabbāva etā bhayatajjitā imaṃ chaḍḍetvā palātāti.

records.title: Kīḷanakaṇḍaṃ
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Yo me saṃse mahānāgaṃ, tejassiṃ duratikkamaṃ; Tassa dajjaṃ imaṃ selaṃ, jalantamiva tejasā’’ti.

records.title: Kīḷanakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: Who in brahmin-guise, a supaṇṇa lord of birds, seeks to conquer the nāga, hunting his own prey (bhakkha)?
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Ko nu brāhmaṇavaṇṇena, supaṇṇo patataṃ varo; Nāgaṃ jigīsamanvesi, anvesaṃ bhakkhamattano’’ti.

records.title: Kīḷanakaṇḍaṃ
records.evidence_pali: …ānaṃ isīnaṃ aññataraṃ. Sammantanti vasantaṃ. Kāmasāti attano icchāya. Mamāti taṃ mantaṃ mayhaṃ pakāsesi. Tyāhaṃ mante, paratthaddhoti ahaṃ te mante upatthaddho nissito. Bhoginanti nāgānaṃ. Visaghātānanti visaghātakavejjānaṃ.

records.title: Kīḷanakaṇḍaṃ
records.evidence_pali: Taṃ sutvā nesādabrāhmaṇo cintesi ‘‘ayaṃ alampāyano yvāssa nāgaṃ dasseti, tassa maṇiratanaṃ dassati, bhūridattamassa dassetvā maṇiṃ gaṇhissāmī’’ti. Tato puttena saddhiṃ mantento gāthamāha –

records.title: Kīḷanakaṇḍaṃ
records.evidence_pali: …esādabrāhmaṇo ‘‘somadatto ṭhapetvā attano gehaṃ kuhiṃ gamissatī’’ti cintento alampāyanaṃ thokaṃ anattamanaṃ disvā ‘‘alampāyana, mā cintayi, dassessāmi te bhūridatta’’nti taṃ ādāya nāgarājassa uposathakaraṇaṭṭhānaṃ gantvā vammikamatthake bhoge ābhujitvā nipannaṃ nāgarājānaṃ disvā avidūre ṭhito hatthaṃ pasāretvā dve gāthā abhāsi –

records.title: Kīḷanakaṇḍaṃ
records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Gaṇhāhetaṃ mahānāgaṃ, āharetaṃ maṇiṃ mama; Indagopakavaṇṇābho, yassa lohitako siro.

records.title: Kīḷanakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: The gem fell to the ground and at once sank into the earth and went back to the nāga-realm (nāgabhavanaṃ)
records.evidence_pali: …a kujjhissāmi na olokessāmī’’ti akkhīni nimīletvā adhiṭṭhānapāramiṃ purecārikaṃ katvā bhogantare sīsaṃ pakkhipitvā niccalova hutvā nipajji. Nesādabrāhmaṇopi ‘‘bho alampāyana, imaṃ nāgaṃ gaṇhāhi, dehi me maṇi’’nti āha. Alampāyano nāgaṃ disvā tuṭṭho maṇiṃ kismiñci agaṇetvā ‘‘gaṇha, brāhmaṇā’’ti tassa hatthe khipi. So tassa hatthato gaḷitvā pathaviyaṃ pati. Patitamattova pathaviṃ pavisitvā nāgabhavanameva gato.

records.title: Kīḷanakaṇḍaṃ

Sucijātiko nāgarājā sīlabhedabhayena akujjhitvā akkhīnipi na ummīlesi. Atha naṃ osadhamantaṃ katvā naṅguṭṭhe gahetvā heṭṭhāsīsaṃ katvā sañcāletvā gahitabhojanaṃ chaḍḍāpetvā bhūmiyaṃ dīghato nipajjāpe…

records.title: Kīḷanakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: Bhūridatta is too large for the basket; the charmer makes him dance; the nāga resolves to perform to please the crowd so as to be released
records.evidence_pali: …allīhi peḷaṃ sajjetvā mahāsattaṃ tattha pakkhipi, sarīrassa mahantatāya tattha na pavisati. Atha naṃ paṇhiyā koṭṭento pavesetvā peḷaṃ ādāya ekaṃ gāmaṃ gantvā gāmamajjhe otāretvā ‘‘nāgassa naccaṃ daṭṭhukāmā āgacchantū’’ti saddamakāsi. Sakalagāmavāsino sannipatiṃsu. Tasmiṃ khaṇe alampāyano ‘‘nikkhama mahānāgā’’ti āha. Mahāsatto cintesi ‘‘ajja mayā parisaṃ tosentena kīḷituṃ vaṭṭati. Evaṃ alampāyano bahuṃ dhanaṃ labhitvā tuṭṭho maṃ vissajjessati. Yaṃ yaṃ esa maṃ kāreti, taṃ taṃ karissāmī…

records.title: Kīḷanakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: The captured nāga-king is fed honey-grain and killed frogs, refuses food, and is made to perform in villages.

Nāgarājassa pana madhulāje deti, maṇḍūke māretvā deti, so gocaraṃ na gaṇhāti avissajjanabhayena. Gocaraṃ aggaṇhantampi puna naṃ cattāro dvāragāme ādiṃ katvā tattha tattha māsamattaṃ kīḷāpesi.…

records.title: Nagarapavesanakaṇḍaṃ

records.title: Nagarapavesanakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: The nāga-king (Bhūridatta) is summoned to dance; nāgas look over the crowd for two reasons — supaṇṇa-danger or kinsfolk; fearing supaṇṇa they will not dance, ashamed before kin they will not dance

records.title: Nagarapavesanakaṇḍaṃ

records.title: Nagarapavesanakaṇḍaṃ
records.evidence_pali: Tattha nāgenāti tvaṃ nāgena mayā saddhiṃ yujjha, ahaṃ maṇḍūkachāpiyā tayā saddhiṃ yujjhissāmi. Ā sahassehi pañcahīti tasmiṃ no yuddhe yāva pañcahi sahassehi abbhutaṃ hotūti.

records.title: Nagarapavesanakaṇḍaṃ

records.title: Nagarapavesanakaṇḍaṃ
records.claim: 'With a venomless nāga (avisena nāgena) you greatly deceive people' — implies an ordinary nāga would have venom

records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Kharājino jaṭī dummī, ditto parisamāgato; Yo tvaṃ evaṃ gataṃ nāgaṃ, ‘aviso’ atimaññati.

records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Siyā visaṃ siluttassa, deḍḍubhassa silābhuno; Neva lohitasīsassa, visaṃ nāgassa vijjatī’’ti.

records.title: Nagarapavesanakaṇḍaṃ

records.evidence_pali: ‘‘Ayaṃ nāgo mahiddhiko, tejassī duratikkamo; Tena taṃ ḍaṃsayissāmi, so taṃ bhasmaṃ karissatī’’ti.
